zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande de Bar於1341年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布巴-素-時，她的父親Thibault de Bar27歲，母親Marie de Namur de Dampierre19歲。她於1360年與Eudes VI de Grancey在法國阿奎泰結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1410年在法國布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande de Bar was born in 1341, in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Thibault de Bar, was 27 and her mother, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, was 19. She married Eudes VI de Grancey in 1360, in Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died about 1410, in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande de Bar est née en 1341, à Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Thibault de Bar, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes VI de Grancey en 1360, à Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1410, à Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande de Bar 1341 in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibault de Bar 27 und ihre Mutter Marie de Namur de Dampierre 19. Sie hat 1360 in Aquitaine, Frankreich Eudes VI de Grancey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1410 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Bar è nata il nel 1341 nel Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Thibault de Bar, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Eudes VI de Grancey nel 1360, nel Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa 1410, nel Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolande de Barが1341年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベバー-スル-セアインで生まれた時，父Thibault de Barは27歳，母Marie de Namur de Dampierreは19歳であった。1360年にフランスアクイティアインでEudes VI de Granceyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1410年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルグランセイ-レ-チaテアウで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande de Bar(이)가 1341년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 바-수-세이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibault de Bar(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Namur de Dampierre(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1360년 프랑스 아키테인에서 Eudes VI de Grancey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1410년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 그랜스이-레-cha테오에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Bar nasceu em 1341, em Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Thibault de Bar, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes VI de Grancey em 1360, em Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1410, em Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande de Bar родилась в 1341 г. в местности бар-сур-син, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Thibault de Bar было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Namur de Dampierre, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes VI de Grancey в 1360 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1410 г. в местности гранси-ле-чaто, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande de Bar nació en 1341, en Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Thibault de Bar, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marie de Namur de Dampierre, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Eudes VI de Grancey en 1360, en Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1410, en Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 70 años.
